rootCauseContract: Gemini CLI 0.50.0 advertises and auto-selects gateway auth from GOOGLE_GEMINI_BASE_URL, but its headless auth validator rejects the gateway enum before request construction.
regressionChecks: the runner writes selectedType only inside its private ephemeral home
the custom base URL still routes every model request through the private broker
the broker token is sent as the Gemini API key and no Google credential enters the lane
a runner change creates a new immutable adapter volume rather than overwriting v1
